title: peristylus tetralobus f. typicus
intro: Peristylus tetralobus f. typicus, also known as the Small Clubbed Orchid, is a species of orchid native to India and Sri Lanka. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Peristylus tetralobus f. typicus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the roots in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
